name: Favorite Turkey Stuffing - Yankee
recipeIngredient: 10 cups White bread (firm), cubed into 1-inch pieces
1/2 lb Kielbasa, diced (or other garlic sausage)
1 1/2 cups Fresh thyme (minced) or 1-1/2 teaspoons Dried thyme
2 lbs Chestnuts (peeled), roasted or 2 cups vacuum-packed, roasted chestnuts
recipeInstructions: For a 15-pound turkey. Spread the bread cubes on a cookie sheet and let dry overnight. Place in a large bowl, pour 1 cup milk over, and toss lightly. Set aside. Melt 1/2 cup butter in a wide skillet over medium heat. Add the sausage and cook, stirring often, until meat is lightly browned. Remove with a slotted spoon. Cook celery the same way. If pan lacks fat, add more butter. Raise heat to medium-high, add mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until browned. Add mushrooms to bread bowl and pour wine into skillet. Stir to loosen browned bits, then pour into bread bowl. Add seasonings, fruit, and nuts; toss vigorously until combined. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Stir in eggs. If very dry, add more milk.
